name: schoolsaas-bf
description: Plateforme hybride de gestion scolaire et universitaire adaptee au Burkina Faso.

scripts.dev:api: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && ts-node -P apps/api/tsconfig.json apps/api/src/main.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run build:worker
scripts.lint: npm run build:shared && npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:worker
